'''dhashara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enameloid|enameloid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enameloid|enameloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhashara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæshæræth|dhæshæræth]] || [[word:dhæshæræj|dhæshæræj]] || [[word:dhæshæræsh|dhæshæræsh]] || [[word:dhæshæræ|dhæshæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashasharath|dhashasharath]] || [[word:dhashasharaj|dhashasharaj]] || [[word:dhashasharash|dhashasharash]] || [[word:dhashashara|dhashashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasharath|dhasharath]] || [[word:dhasharaj|dhasharaj]] || [[word:dhasharash|dhasharash]] || [[word:dhashara|dhashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashafrafth|dhashafrafth]] || [[word:dhashafrafj|dhashafrafj]] || [[word:dhashafrafsh|dhashafrafsh]] || [[word:dhashafraf|dhashafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasharatha|dhasharatha]] || [[word:dhasharaja|dhasharaja]] || [[word:dhasharasha|dhasharasha]] || [[word:dhasharaka|dhasharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasharath|dhasharath]] || [[word:dhasharaj|dhasharaj]] || [[word:dhasharash|dhasharash]] || [[word:dhashara|dhashara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasharathal|dhasharathal]] || [[word:dhasharajal|dhasharajal]] || [[word:dhasharashal|dhasharashal]] || [[word:dhasharakal|dhasharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasharaathatha|dhasharaathatha]] || [[word:dhasharaajaja|dhasharaajaja]] || [[word:dhasharaashasha|dhasharaashasha]] || [[word:dhasharaaka|dhasharaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasharathan|dhasharathan]] || [[word:dhasharajan|dhasharajan]] || [[word:dhasharashan|dhasharashan]] || [[word:dhasharakan|dhasharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasharathaoro|dhasharathaoro]] || [[word:dhasharajaoro|dhasharajaoro]] || [[word:dhasharashaoro|dhasharashaoro]] || [[word:dhasharakaoro|dhasharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
